metadata.sourceNotes: Phase 2 Symi low cleanup 2026-05-28: OSM/Mapcarta supports same-name Sara Beach identity/location near the current coordinates. BeachAtlas supports Sarah/Sara Beach in Symi as a small cove about 15-20 minutes walking from the port, reached by steps, with pebble/rock terrain and some shade. High Heels & a Backpack supports coastal walking access from Ano Symi toward Sarah Beach. Conflicting organized-service claims were not encoded. No live condition claim was encoded. Popular-source confidence pass CL 2026-06-05: Visit Symi, SymiTop, Aegli Apartments Symi, AllOverGreece, Symi Day Cruises, Travelfind and BeachAtlas sources support the recorded Symi beach identity and static access/terrain/shade/service context. Promoted to high for static beach facts only; source calm/clear/safe/protected wording was not imported into windProfile, scoring, photos, water-quality, or live calm/protected/safe claims.
